summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cloudinary gallery implementation with tag-based media loading. Backend APIs working perfectly with 65 promoprints and 17 embroidery assets. Frontend gallery displays correctly with modal preview functionality.

design_issues.issue: Gallery rows showing equal scroll width and client width on both desktop and mobile, suggesting CSS grid auto-sizing may be fitting all content in viewport rather than creating scrollable overflow
design_issues.note: Netflix-style scrolling may need CSS adjustments to force overflow with fixed card widths

passed_tests: Backend /api/gallery?tag=promoprints returns 65 assets with correct structure (ok:true, tag, assets array)
Backend /api/gallery?tag=embroidery returns 17 assets with correct structure
Backend /api/gallery without tag returns proper 400 error
Gallery page loads with Gallery Categories section
Promotional Printing section displays with correct title and subtitle
Embroidery section displays with correct title and subtitle
65 promotional printing cards loaded and displayed
Click thumbnail opens modal preview with image displayed
Modal shows public_id title and format/type metadata correctly
Click outside modal (on overlay) closes modal
Modal displays high-resolution preview images with Cloudinary transforms
